artifact.content_preview:
From: security.audit@tbs-sct.gc.ca
To: ngis-pm@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: itsec-director@ssc-spc.gc.ca; ciso@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: URGENT: ITSG-33 Compliance Gap — NGIS Phase 3 Network Migration
Date: Thu, 5 Mar 2026 08:47:15 -0500

Project Management Team,

During the scheduled ITSG-33 security compliance review for NGIS Phase 3
(review conducted February 28–March 4, 2026), our audit team identified
a Category 2 finding that must be addressed before the migration proceeds.

FINDING SUMMARY:
Control: IA

metadata.subject: URGENT: ITSG-33 Compliance Gap — NGIS Phase 3 Network Migration

risks.description: Missing PAW architecture documentation may block migration; 'March 18 migration window should be considered at risk'

evidence_refs.excerpt: March 18 migration window should be considered at risk

risks.description: ITSG-33 'Category 2 finding' non-compliance on IA-5 may halt PBMM cloud hosting authorization

evidence_refs.excerpt: SSC's PBMM cloud hosting authorization may be placed on hold

risks.description: PBMM authorization hold could disrupt 'other GC-Cloud workloads depending on the shared AD infrastructure'

evidence_refs.excerpt: other GC-Cloud workloads depending on the shared AD infrastructure

risks.description: SA&A package incomplete; 'Privileged Access Workstation (PAW) architecture documentation' missing from submission

evidence_refs.excerpt: SA&A package is missing the Privileged Access Workstation (PAW) architecture documentation

risks.description: Tight remediation deadline of 'March 12, 2026' risks insufficient time to resolve Category 2 finding

evidence_refs.excerpt: updated SA&A documentation addressing Control IA-5 to this office no later than March 12, 2026
